nasb.text: Therefore the woman ought to have a symbol of authority on her head, because of the angels.

esv.text: That is why a wife ought to have a symbol of authority on her head, because of the angels.

cnv.text: 因此，為天使的緣故，女人應當在頭上有服權柄的記號。

ccb.text: 因此为了天使的缘故，女人在头上应该有服权柄的记号。

csbs.text: 因此，为了天使的缘故，应该有权柄在女人的头之上。
